nodes.context: Nigerian confraternity involved in criminal activities such as drug trafficking, passport forgery, money laundering, and sex trafficking.
Nigerian confraternity-affiliated group, rival of the Supreme Eiye Confraternity.

edges.evidence_quote: The confraternity has a long-standing rivalry with Black Axe, another Nigerian confraternity-affiliated group.
edges.context: The Supreme Eiye Confraternity has a long-standing rivalry with Black Axe, involving killings of rival members.
